calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2017 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
